reasoning: On August 3, 2025, MrBeast had 418 million subscribers. By September 2025, he surpassed 431 million, showing strong growth. However, recent data points show he hit 453 million on November 30 and 453.2 million on December 2. To reach 460 million by the end of 2025, he needs to gain approximately 6.8 million subscribers in 29 days (from Dec 2), which requires a daily average of ~234,000 subscribers. His historical growth rate from Sept to Nov was around 244k/day, but the trend has shown a deceleration since the summer peak (when he was gaining ~464k/day). The Manifold market was priced at 20% on Nov 27, almost certainly reflecting this decelerating trajectory and the likelihood that he falls just short (e.g. 458-459M) by December 31. Because he is averaging very close to the required daily pace, a late-year viral push could cross the line, but the math and trend favor him missing it slightly. Therefore, I estimate a 24% chance.
